hot_topics.topic: Log file disk space explosion (dual reports)
hot_topics.note: Two separate bug reports: 17GB+ via hardcoded log path (#16142, 6 comments) and 26GB+ via auto-updater HTTP 418 retry loop (#15947). Both open with no fix merged.
29 sessions hard-deleted via internal API (soft:false). No recovery. Open since 2026-06-16.
App hangs unrecoverably when context is too large. 4 comments, no resolution.

hot_topics.topic: Quick Assist MCP tools not called
hot_topics.note: Quick Assist silently skips MCP/tool calls — core integration broken.
Multi-turn searches return identical results. Reported yesterday.
advisor-tool-2026-03-01 beta header causing 400 rejections — should be removed from aiCore.

hot_topics.note: DeJeune actively building v2 message renderer and chat foundation layer — major structural sprint this week.

community_sentiment.observation: Open issues increased by 7 from yesterday (941→948). 59 new issues in last 7 days shows sustained high user activity. Three CRITICAL bugs open (disk exhaustion ×2, data loss) with no fix merged. Dev velocity remains high: 146 PRs merged to main in 30 days.
